rationale: The current translation (792d5231) is complete and high-quality. The previous judge report mentioned English headings, but the provided 'current' MDX content for the RU version actually shows these headings are already translated (e.g., '## Рецепты fetch', '### Помощник рекурсивных повторов'). The Gist paths in the RU version have an extra '../' prefix compared to the EN version, which is correct for the nested directory structure (ru/index.mdx vs index.mdx). No further high-priority fixes are required.

suggestionLog.reason: The heading was left in English while the rest of the document is translated.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
